regional_cost_note: Cladding installers in Rotorua typically charge $125–$190/m² for primed pine weatherboard, $105–$170/m² for fibre cement, and $190–$295/m² for brick veneer. Rotorua rates are generally competitive — expect to pay near or slightly below the national average. Weathertightness is critical — use only licensed builders for restricted building work on cladding.
